titleStmt.title: SII 20.199: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 199. (B.K. No. 78 of 1938-39.) KUNDGŌḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in front of the Durgā temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 32, Śārvari, Chaitra, ba. 11. Wednesday, corresponding to A.D. 1240, March 20, which was a Tuesday and not Wednesday. The tithi ended on that day at ·92.

The inscription is in two parts. The first part, in Sanskrit language, records the gift of six nivartanas of land for the benefit of the temple of Durgā at Kundaṁguḷa by Mallaśarma, son of Basavaṇa and grandson of Mādhavārya, with the consent of the king's minister Vāsudēva. The record was composed by Vaijanātha.

The latter part of the inscription, written in Kannaḍa language, apparently refers to the same gift mentioned above. The donor is called here Taḷiyara Mallayya. It also records a gift of oil made by the Fifty-Families (Aivattokkalu) of Kuṁduṁgoḷa, for burning a perpetual lamp in the same temple. The Thousand Mahājanas of Kuṁduṁguḷa were to protect the gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdrajāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . sa jaya
ti mahāvarāhō yaddaṁṣṭrākōṭi tā dharaṇī bhāti jagatprabhavāhṛta sumēru
kaḷaśāṁkabhājanākārā . Asti kṣōṇīnivāsaś®titativasatiśrīvadhūlā
syabhūmiḥ śrīmatkuṁdaṁguḷākhyō daśamukhavijayē rāmadattāgrahāraḥ . yatrā
jasrādhvarāḷīniyamitaviḷasanmaṁtrapūtāhutīnāṁ sāraiḥ saṁprāptaśakti(ḥ)
stribhuvanamabhayaṁ pāti dēvōpi śakraḥ . mābhairmmābhairdēhi dēhi prapaṁnā(ṁ)
n trāhi trāhītyādi vēdaprasaṁgē . paṭutarkkāṇāṁ vādamadyēpi yasmi
n kīrā vīthīpaṁjarasthāḥ (.) paṭhaṁti . yatra trāsaḥ kumaṇau chatradaṁḍaḥ sa
māgatā padmē . rōdhō nadyāṁ baṁdhaḥ kābyē śulkaṁ ś®tā na vā lōkē . tasya kuṁdaṁguḷā
bhikhyā kāriṇī sarbbamaṁgaḷā . babhūva durggā traiḷōkyarakṣārtthaṁ suranirmmi
tā . tatrābhūnmādhavāryō basavaṇavibudhastatsutaḥ khyātavyidyaḥ saṁ
satsvardhēnugarbhaprabhavavibhavatō vatsagōtraikadhuryyaḥ . tasmācchrīmallaśarmmā
samajani viḷasadvēdavēdiprasiddhastyāgī dharmmaikaniṣṭhō budhajanavi
nutaḥ sarbbalōkōpakārī . yasminnāvāsalōbhātsvayamaja
ni śivaḥ sāpi durggā prasiddā yasyā śrīkāryyasiddhyai vitataguṇagaṇō
mallaśarmātibhaktyā prādātkuṁdaṁgaḷaṁ sadvijamatasahitō nāṁgulī
prēkṣaṇīyaṁ ṣaṭkaṁ naivarttanaṁ tadvitataphaḷayutaṁ kṣētramadhyē svakīyē .
śrīmatsiṁhaḷadēvamaṁtrisacivaḥ (.) śrī vāsudēvābhidhō nētā tadvita
taprabhāvaghaṭakaśārṅgasphuratsārabhūḥ . karṇnākrāṁtaguṇānatō bu
dhajanānīkaikacintāmaṇistanumatyābhyadadhatsa mallavibudhaḥ
kṣētraṁ śivāyai svakaṁ . © vaijanāthakritiḥ . stastyanēkaguṇa
gaṇāḷaṁkritamukhakamaḷavinirggatavēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgaśāstrānēkasmṛtipu
rāṇavāgubhūśaṇaruṁ japaniyamahōmasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānu
ṣṭhānaparāyaṇaruṁ viditavēdavidyāpāragaruṁ śaṭukarmmaniyataruṁ saptasōma saṁsthā
vabhritāvagāhanapavitrīkritōttamāṁgaruṁ dvātriṁśatusahasra
samayāgraga(ṁ)ṇyarēkavākyarahitavidhvaṁsakarāśritajanakaḷpavrikṣaruṁ śaraṇā
gatavajrapanjararuṁ duṣṭanigraviśiṣṭapratipāḷakaruṁ śrī calakke na
llaruṁ śrī svayaṁbhūdēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa śrīma
danādiyagrahāraṁ kuṁduṁgoḷadūroḍeya pramukha śrī
madaṣēśamahājanaṁ sāsirvvara viśadayaśa(ḥ)ssudhāsūtidyōtidaśadiśācakramanaśēśaṁ dhava
ḷisuttamire yire . © svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakrapartti śrī
siṁhaṇarāyavaruśada 32 neya sārvvari saṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa 11 bu
dhavāradalu taḷiyara mallayyanuṁ hebbasāge Areśatada taṁma sā(ṁ)myada keyyoḷa
ge matta 6 maṁ durggādēvateya Aṁgāṁgabhōgārtthavāgi sarvvabādhepari
haravaṁ māḍi koṭṭanu . © . mattaṁ śrīmatkuṁduṁgoḷada dharmmiṣṭa
rayvattokkalu śrīmatu durggādēvateya naṁdāvaḷakke gāṇakkaddane
ṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru . yiṁtī dharmmamaṁ sāsirvvaru pratipāḷisu
suvaru . © . © . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhistagarādhibhiḥ . yasya
yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭhirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāt śrē
yōnupālanaṁ . dānāttvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
padaṁ . yiṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁge prayāge vāra
ṇāśi kurukṣētravargghyatīrthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ
koḷaguvaṁ paṁcaratnadalu kaṭṭisi dakṣiṇesahitaṁ sāsirvvarvvēdapā
ragarappa brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhiya koṭṭa phalamakkuyī dha
rmmamanaḷidavargge sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirvvabrāhmaṇōttama
rumaṁ koṁda mahāpātakamakkū . maṁgaḷa mahā © śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
